action.reasoning: Observation: Fingerprint MLP achieved Val MAE=0.1723, above the SMILES ceiling of 0.12-0.14. 3D methods can achieve 0.03-0.06 but PyG SchNet segfaulted. Analysis: Need to test torchmd-net (different from PyG, may work) for 3D approach. Also need to submit eval for baseline score. Decision: Submit eval for current model AND test torchmd-net compatibility. If torchmd-net works, switch to 3D training for much better results.
